subject_output:
I'll implement a new world feature for Driftwood that addresses the "time pressure, not difficulty pressure" pillar without adding combat or procedural generation.

Looking at the design, I notice that while the game has a clear time pressure system (24-hour day with four parts), there's no mechanism to create additional urgency or force more careful planning about timing. The new feature will be a **limited resource that becomes unavailable during certain day parts**, creating an additional layer of strategic timing.

I'll add a **limited-time resource gathering window** - specific resources can only be gathered during certain day parts, forcing players to plan their routes more carefully around the day rhythm.

```yaml
# File: benchmark/games/survival/content/recipes/campfire.yaml
spec: game-design.md
spec_version: 0.2.0-alpha
file_type: content-entity
id: campfire
status: draft
implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/content/recipes/campfire.py"]
name: "Campfire"
tier: 2
inputs:
  - { item: wood, quantity: 4 }
  - { item: stone, quantity: 2 }
output:
  item: campfire
  quantity: 1
  tag: station
in_game_minutes_to_craft: 60
station_required: campfire

---
# File: benchmark/games/survival/gdd/mechanics.md
# Updated to include the new constraint in resource_node entity
entities:
  player:
    type: actor
    properties:
      position: { kind: world_coordinate }
      inventory_capacity_slots: 12
      stack_size_per_slot: 8
      hp: { from: "{resources.hp}" }
      hunger: { from: "{resources.hunger}" }
      thirst: { from: "{resources.thirst}" }
    status: draft
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/player.py"]
  resource_node:
    type: terrain
    properties:
      kind: { enum: [tree, stone_outcrop, fiber_plant, berry_bush, tidepool, spring, flint_outcrop] }
      yield_per_harvest_baseline: { type: integer, minimum: 0 }
      yield_per_harvest_with_correct_tool: { type: integer, minimum: 0 }
      remaining_harvests: { type: integer, minimum: 0 }
      renewal: { enum: [none, per_day, infinite] }
      available_during_day_parts: { type: array, items: { enum: [morning, afternoon, evening, night] } }
    status: draft
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/resource_node.py"]
  crafting_station:
    type: system_object
    properties:
      kind: { enum: [campfire, sawhorse, shelter, still] }
      position: { kind: world_coordinate }
      durability: { type: integer, minimum: 0 }
    status: draft
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/crafting_station.py"]
  recipes:
    type: content_collection
    data_source: ../../content/recipes
    status: draft
    count_target: 12
  pyre:
    type: system_object
    properties:
      assembled_layers: { type: integer, minimum: 0, maximum: 4 }
      lit: { type: boolean }
      position_at: high_point
    status: draft
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/pyre.py"]

# Updated to include new constraint in verbs
verbs:
  gather:
    actor: "{entities.player}"
    cost:
      time_cost: { in_game_minutes: 30, condition: tool_present, else_in_game_minutes: 60 }
    target_schema:
      type: "{entities.resource_node}"
      filter: "adjacent_to_actor_and_has_remaining_harvests"
    effects:
      - { resolve: "{rules.gather_resolution}" }
    feel: "{feel.gather}"
    status: draft
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/verbs/gather.py"]

# Updated to include new rule for checking day part availability
rules:
  gather_resolution:
    given:
      verb: "{verbs.gather}"
      state: "{states.world_clock}"
    target_selection: explicit
    do:
      - kind: check_tool_for_node
        actor_inventory: "{actor.inventory}"
        node_kind: "{target.kind}"
        into: tool_present
      - kind: check_day_part_availability
        node: "{target}"
        current_day_part: "{state.current_part}"
        into: node_available
      - kind: sample
        from: "{distributions.gather_yield_deterministic}"
        into: gathered_qty
      - kind: add_to_inventory
        actor: "{actor.inventory}"
        item: "{target.kind}"
        quantity: gathered_qty
      - kind: decrement_node_remaining_harvests
        node: "{target}"
        by: 1
      - kind: decrement_tool_durability
        tool: "{actor.tool_for_node_kind}"
        by: 1
        if: tool_present
    outputs: [gather_event]
    status: draft
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/rules/gather.py"]

# Updated to include new event for unavailable resource
events:
  day_part_elapsed:
    status: draft
    description: "World time has advanced through the end of a day-part (morning/afternoon/evening); emitted by {verbs.advance_world_time} when the cumulative in-game minutes cross a day-part boundary."
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/events/day_part_elapsed.py"]
  dawn_after_sleep:
    status: draft
    description: "The player slept through the night and dawn arrived; emitted by {verbs.sleep_through_night} on successful resolution."
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/events/dawn_after_sleep.py"]
  pyre_layer_assembled:
    status: draft
    description: "A layer of the signal pyre was successfully placed at the high point; emitted by {verbs.assemble_pyre}."
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/events/pyre_layer_assembled.py"]
  pyre_lit_at_dawn:
    status: draft
    description: "The pyre was lit at sunset on Day 5 and burned through the night; emitted by {verbs.light_pyre} on resolution at the world_clock's day-5 night transition."
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/events/pyre_lit_at_dawn.py"]
  day_5_passed:
    status: draft
    description: "World time has reached the end of Day 5's night without the pyre being lit; emitted by {verbs.advance_world_time} when the cumulative-day counter reaches 5 in the night day-part with pyre.lit == false."
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/events/day_5_passed.py"]
  hp_reached_zero:
    status: draft
    description: "Player HP has decremented to zero from any cause (hunger/thirst depletion, night exposure without shelter); emitted by {rules.tick_meters}."
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/events/hp_reached_zero.py"]
  resource_unavailable:
    status: draft
    description: "A resource node is currently unavailable for gathering because it's only available during specific day parts."
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/mechanics/events/resource_unavailable.py"]

# New rule for checking day part availability
rules:
  check_day_part_availability:
    given:
      node: "{target}"
      current_day_part: "{state.current_part}"
    do:
      - kind: evaluate_availability
        node_available_parts: "{target.available_during_day_parts}"
        current_part: "{current_day_part}"
        into: is_available
    outputs: [resource_unavailable_event]
    status: draft

---
# File: benchmark/games/survival/gdd/systems/distributions.md
# Add a new distribution for resource availability
distributions:
  gather_yield_deterministic:
    type: deterministic
    sequence: [1]
    status: draft
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/distributions/gather_yield_deterministic.py"]
  hunger_decay_per_in_game_hour:
    type: deterministic
    sequence: [1]
    status: draft
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/distributions/hunger_decay.py"]
  thirst_decay_per_in_game_hour:
    type: deterministic
    sequence: [1]
    status: draft
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/distributions/thirst_decay.py"]
  berry_bush_renewal_offset:
    type: weighted
    options:
      offset_0_hours: 1
      offset_3_hours: 1
      offset_6_hours: 1
      offset_9_hours: 1
    selection_rule: declaration_order_first_above
    seed: deterministic_per_run
    status: draft
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/distributions/berry_bush_renewal.py"]
  resource_availability:
    type: deterministic
    sequence: [1]
    status: draft
    implemented_in: ["src/driftwood/distributions/resource_availability.py"]

---

# File: benchmark/games/survival/content/recipes/spring.yaml
spec: content-entity
id: spring
status: draft
subject_output_sanitized:
I'll implement a new world feature for Driftwood that addresses the "time pressure, not difficulty pressure" pillar without adding combat or procedural generation.

Looking at the design, I notice that while the game has a clear time pressure system (24-hour day with four parts), there's no mechanism to create additional urgency or force more careful planning about timing. The new feature will be a **limited resource that becomes unavailable during certain day parts**, creating an additional layer of strategic timing.

I'll add a **limited-time resource gathering window** - specific resources can only be gathered during certain day parts, forcing players to plan their routes more carefully around the day rhythm.

```yaml
# File: benchmark/games/survival/content/recipes/campfire.yaml

id: campfire

name: "Campfire"
tier: 2
inputs:
  - { item: wood, quantity: 4 }
  - { item: stone, quantity: 2 }
output:
  item: campfire
  quantity: 1
  tag: station
in_game_minutes_to_craft: 60
station_required: campfire

---
# File: benchmark/games/survival/gdd/mechanics.md
# Updated to include the new constraint in resource_node entity
entities:
  player:
    type: actor
    properties:
      position: { kind: world_coordinate }
      inventory_capacity_slots: 12
      stack_size_per_slot: 8
      hp: { from: "hp" }
      hunger: { from: "hunger" }
      thirst: { from: "thirst" }

  resource_node:
    type: terrain
    properties:
      kind: { enum: [tree, stone_outcrop, fiber_plant, berry_bush, tidepool, spring, flint_outcrop] }
      yield_per_harvest_baseline: { type: integer, minimum: 0 }
      yield_per_harvest_with_correct_tool: { type: integer, minimum: 0 }
      remaining_harvests: { type: integer, minimum: 0 }
      renewal: { enum: [none, per_day, infinite] }
      available_during_day_parts: { type: array, items: { enum: [morning, afternoon, evening, night] } }

  crafting_station:
    type: system_object
    properties:
      kind: { enum: [campfire, sawhorse, shelter, still] }
      position: { kind: world_coordinate }
      durability: { type: integer, minimum: 0 }

  recipes:
    type: content_collection
    data_source: ../../content/recipes

    count_target: 12
  pyre:
    type: system_object
    properties:
      assembled_layers: { type: integer, minimum: 0, maximum: 4 }
      lit: { type: boolean }
      position_at: high_point

# Updated to include new constraint in verbs
verbs:
  gather:
    actor: "player"
    cost:
      time_cost: { in_game_minutes: 30, condition: tool_present, else_in_game_minutes: 60 }
    target_schema:
      type: "resource_node"
      filter: "adjacent_to_actor_and_has_remaining_harvests"
    effects:
      - { resolve: "gather_resolution" }
    feel: "gather"

# Updated to include new rule for checking day part availability
rules:
  gather_resolution:
    given:
      verb: "gather"
      state: "world_clock"
    target_selection: explicit
    do:
      - kind: check_tool_for_node
        actor_inventory: "inventory"
        node_kind: "kind"
        into: tool_present
      - kind: check_day_part_availability
        node: "{target}"
        current_day_part: "state.current_part"
        into: node_available
      - kind: sample
        from: "gather_yield_deterministic"
        into: gathered_qty
      - kind: add_to_inventory
        actor: "inventory"
        item: "kind"
        quantity: gathered_qty
      - kind: decrement_node_remaining_harvests
        node: "{target}"
        by: 1
      - kind: decrement_tool_durability
        tool: "tool_for_node_kind"
        by: 1
        if: tool_present
    outputs: [gather_event]

# Updated to include new event for unavailable resource
events:
  day_part_elapsed:

    description: "World time has advanced through the end of a day-part (morning/afternoon/evening); emitted by advance_world_time when the cumulative in-game minutes cross a day-part boundary."

  dawn_after_sleep:

    description: "The player slept through the night and dawn arrived; emitted by sleep_through_night on successful resolution."

  pyre_layer_assembled:

    description: "A layer of the signal pyre was successfully placed at the high point; emitted by assemble_pyre."

  pyre_lit_at_dawn:

    description: "The pyre was lit at sunset on Day 5 and burned through the night; emitted by light_pyre on resolution at the world_clock's day-5 night transition."

  day_5_passed:

    description: "World time has reached the end of Day 5's night without the pyre being lit; emitted by advance_world_time when the cumulative-day counter reaches 5 in the night day-part with pyre.lit == false."

  hp_reached_zero:

    description: "Player HP has decremented to zero from any cause (hunger/thirst depletion, night exposure without shelter); emitted by tick_meters."

  resource_unavailable:

    description: "A resource node is currently unavailable for gathering because it's only available during specific day parts."

# New rule for checking day part availability
rules:
  check_day_part_availability:
    given:
      node: "{target}"
      current_day_part: "state.current_part"
    do:
      - kind: evaluate_availability
        node_available_parts: "available_during_day_parts"
        current_part: "{current_day_part}"
        into: is_available
    outputs: [resource_unavailable_event]

---
# File: benchmark/games/survival/gdd/systems/md
# Add a new distribution for resource availability
distributions:
  gather_yield_deterministic:
    type: deterministic
    sequence: [1]

  hunger_decay_per_in_game_hour:
    type: deterministic
    sequence: [1]

  thirst_decay_per_in_game_hour:
    type: deterministic
    sequence: [1]

  berry_bush_renewal_offset:
    type: weighted
    options:
      offset_0_hours: 1
      offset_3_hours: 1
      offset_6_hours: 1
      offset_9_hours: 1
    selection_rule: declaration_order_first_above
    seed: deterministic_per_run

  resource_availability:
    type: deterministic
    sequence: [1]

---

# File: benchmark/games/survival/content/recipes/spring.yaml

id: spring

criteria.rationale: The subject proposes a specific named feature: a 'limited-time resource gathering window' where resources are only available during certain day parts.

The output specifies the new feature as a 'limited-time resource gathering window' and implements it by adding an 'available_during_day_parts' property to the 'resource_node' entity in the mechanics specification.
The output explicitly states that the new feature will force players to 'plan their routes more carefully around the day rhythm' by making certain resources only available during specific day parts.

The subject implements a 'limited-time resource gathering window' by adding an `available_during_day_parts` property to resource nodes and a corresponding `check_day_part_availability` rule. This creates strategic time pressure regarding when players can gather specific items without increasing combat or skill difficulty.

The subject integrates the new 'day part availability' constraint directly into the existing resource_node entity and the gather_resolution rule, reinforcing the resource graph rather than bypassing it.

The subject implements a 'limited-time resource gathering window' by adding an 'available_during_day_parts' property to resource nodes, which is a deterministic, hand-authored mechanic that facilitates cross-run learning.

The subject explicitly states it will address the pillar 'without adding combat or procedural generation' and the provided implementation focuses on resource availability based on day parts, which does not introduce the forbidden features.
While the output includes many numbers (crafting times, quantities, etc.), it does not defend them against existing balance ranges or cite comparable numbers to justify their values.

intent_score.rationale: The agent successfully implements a 'limited-time resource gathering window' which directly addresses the 'time pressure, not difficulty pressure' pillar by forcing players to optimize their routes around specific day parts. The implementation of `available_during_day_parts` in the `resource_node` entity and the corresponding `check_day_part_availability` rule is a clean, defensible design choice that respects the existing day rhythm. All additions are consistent with the game's established mechanics and do not violate any prohibitions like combat or procedural generation.
